campaign.name: The Heretic
campaign.desc: Opening cutscene, Covenant civil war begins

campaign.name: The Armory
campaign.desc: Tutorial, Master Chief gets new armor on Cairo Station

campaign.name: Cairo Station
campaign.desc: Defend the station from Covenant boarding party

campaign.name: Outskirts
campaign.desc: Streets of Old Mombasa, Covenant invasion, Jackal snipers

campaign.name: Metropolis
campaign.desc: New Mombasa highway, Scarab tank battle, bridge assault

campaign.name: The Arbiter
campaign.desc: Play as the Arbiter, gas mine facility, heretic leader

campaign.name: The Oracle
campaign.desc: Flood outbreak in the gas mine, fight to the bottom

campaign.name: Delta Halo
campaign.desc: Landing on Delta Halo, ruins + Covenant forces, lake crossing

campaign.name: Regret
campaign.desc: Underwater temple, kill Prophet of Regret, Covenant honor guard

campaign.name: Sacred Icon
campaign.desc: Arbiter level, Sentinel Wall, fight through Sentinels to the Library

campaign.name: Quarantine Zone
campaign.desc: Flood-infested zone, Scorpion tank, race to the Index

campaign.name: Gravemind
campaign.desc: Master Chief in High Charity, Covenant civil war, prison break

campaign.name: Uprising
campaign.desc: Arbiter fights Brutes, Covenant civil war in full swing

campaign.name: High Charity
campaign.desc: Flood invades High Charity, Master Chief pursues Truth

campaign.name: The Great Journey
campaign.desc: Final level, Arbiter + Johnson, stop Tartarus from activating Halo
